title: Add tsx and @supabase/supabase-js to devDependencies
description:
## Objective
Add the two new dev dependencies needed by the seeder script.

## Spec Reference
.devmeta/projects/2026-05-21-seeder-scaffold/2026-05-21-seeder-scaffold-spec.md — Section: Step 1

## Scope
**Files:** package.json, package-lock.json — add tsx and @supabase/supabase-js to devDependencies

## Implementation
1. Run: npm install --save-dev tsx @supabase/supabase-js
2. Verify package.json has both entries in devDependencies
3. Verify npm ls @supabase/supabase-js shows the direct dep is now top-level (was transitive via ra-supabase-core)
4. Run npm run typecheck — must still pass

## Tests
Run: npm run typecheck
Do NOT close until typecheck passes.
acceptance_criteria: npm run typecheck passes and both deps present in devDependencies
